_comment: Copy this to 'pg-console.json' (auto-loaded from the working dir or next to pg_console.py), or pass any file with --config PATH. All keys are optional; CLI flags override the file, which overrides built-in defaults. A YAML file (pg-console.yaml) works too if PyYAML is installed.
_artifacts: Directory where discovered per-cluster artifacts (pg-services.<cluster>.json) are stored AND loaded. Created if missing. One file per cluster; the last-opened cluster is remembered so a bare 'python pg_console.py' reopens it.
_services: Optional: force-load one specific artifact file. Usually leave null and let per-cluster files + last-cluster restore handle it.
